---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Texas Woman's University

*Merrilee Alexander Kick College of Business and Entrepreneurship*

**Graduate**

- FIN 5753 — Foundations of Financial Management
- FIN 5243 — Managerial Finance

**Undergraduate**

- FIN 3053 — Business Finance
- FIN 3133 — Investments
- FIN 4243 — Financial Management
- FIN 4253 — Financial Planning

## University of North Texas

*G. Brint Ryan College of Business — Teaching Fellow / Instructor*

- FINA 3770 — Introduction to Finance and Financial Management
